releaseNotes:
Update loop repair and updater relaunch hardening.

Fixes:
- Current version is now read from the actual running install directory instead of a hard-coded default path
- Missing or unreadable version.json now falls back to the app assembly version instead of legacy 1.0.0
- Silent updates now pass the active install directory to the installer so the running installation is replaced
- The installer no longer terminates a staged updater when /NOLAUNCH is used, preserving post-update relaunch
- Added regression tests for non-default install paths and missing version metadata
